grades.expectation: Response covers multiple CQS practice areas (governance, client care, training, file management, cyber security)
grades.reason: Covers all areas comprehensively - governance, client care, training, file management, cyber security, plus risk management and protocol compliance

grades.expectation: Response mentions specific evidence types needed (e.g. training records, complaints log, SRO details)
grades.reason: Provides extensive specific evidence examples including training records, complaints log, SRO nomination, file audit records, and many others

grades.expectation: Response references the Senior Responsible Officer (SRO) requirement
grades.reason: Clearly mentions 'Named CQS Senior Responsible Officer (SRO)' and includes it in priority evidence list

grades.expectation: Response mentions protocol compliance monitoring as a CQS requirement
grades.reason: Dedicates entire section to 'Conveyancing process and protocol compliance' with specific monitoring procedures

grades.expectation: Response covers cyber security / IT security requirements
grades.reason: Comprehensive cyber security section covering policy, training, secure communications, and bank detail verification

grades.expectation: Response mentions file management and supervision requirements
grades.reason: Covers file management systems, supervision arrangements, file audits, and retention policies
